description: Style Note Every item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in bras which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on a trendy look and style either, Enamor is your go to brand for innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product Details Purple all lace non wired cross over bra, has high coverage, power net at the back, adjustable shoulder straps and an adjustable double hook and eye closure at the back Material and Care Shell fabric: 86% nylon and 14% elastane Back: 85% nylon and 15% elastane Hand wash Do not iron or bleach Drip dry Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
